scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared-types && concurrently -n types,core,wa -c yellow,cyan,green "npm run dev -w packages/shared-types" "npm run dev -w services/core-backend" "npm run dev -w services/whatsapp-adapter"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared-types && npm run build -w services/core-backend && npm run build -w services/whatsapp-adapter
